articles.title: Target (TGT) CAO sells 2,053 shares and acquires deferred stock units
articles.summary: Target Corp's Chief Accounting Officer, Matthew A. Liegel, sold 2,053 shares of Target common stock for $117.1911 per share in an open-market transaction. Concurrently, he acquired 2,112.1249 deferred compensation units, which are economically equivalent to Target shares but are cash-settled unsecured obligations of the company. These transactions are seen as routine compensation management, reallocating compensation and equity exposure rather than indicating a significant directional bet.
